headline: Anthropic pauses token billing for Claude Agent SDK amid adoption surge
body: Anthropic has paused token-based billing for its Claude Agent SDK, signaling a shift in how the company monetizes agentic workflows. This move matters for healthcare AI builders because agent-based systems are becoming central to clinical decision support, documentation automation, and care coordination tasks. Healthcare organizations evaluating Claude for high-volume agentic deployments now face uncertainty around long-term pricing models, which directly impacts ROI calculations for EHR integration and value-based care initiatives. Vendors and consulting firms advising on Claude implementations should clarify billing expectations with Anthropic before recommending agent architectures for production healthcare workflows.
